title: thalictrum minus subsp. dunense
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. dunense, also known as Meadow Rue, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Meadow Rue include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Meadow Rue can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
